on_screen_text:
POV: Your journey of studying abroad.
Stage 1: Preparing for DET and Sending Applications
ESSAY
APPLICATION LETTER
DET
Stage 2: Receiving the Acceptance Letter!
Harvard - Accepted!!
Stage 3: Packing for College
Stage 4: A Bittersweet Goodbye
Dreaming of studying abroad?
Take the duolingo english test
summary: The ad follows the Duolingo mascot, Duo, through the emotional stages of preparing to study abroad, from studying for the Duolingo English Test (DET) to receiving a Harvard acceptance letter, packing, and saying goodbye at the airport. It uses a lighthearted, relatable skit format to connect with students. The final call to action invites aspiring study-abroad students to take the Duolingo English Test.
